overview.title: Account
overview.subtitle: Your account details and status.
overview.loadError: Could not load your account details.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.currentDeviceHint: For your security, we can't identify which of these is the device you're using right now.
sessions.signOutEverywhereConfirm: This signs you out of every device, including this one. You'll need to sign in again.

export.title: Export your data
export.subtitle: Download a copy of your account, profile, settings, and articles as a JSON file.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: These actions affect your whole account. Please proceed carefully.
danger.deactivateDescription: Hide your profile and articles. You can reactivate by signing in again.
danger.deactivateModalDescription: Your profile and articles will be hidden. Sign in again at any time to reactivate. Enter your password to confirm.
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently close your account. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleteModalDescription: This permanently closes your account and signs you out of every device. This cannot be undone. Enter your password and type DELETE to confirm.
danger.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
